message:
feat(logic_table): integrate dispatcher with SQL executor

- Add logic_table module dependency to executor for method dispatch
- Add Dispatcher field and alias-to-class mapping to Executor struct
- Implement evaluateMethodCall for evaluating t.method() expressions
- Refactor Dispatcher to use type-safe callMethod0/1/2 functions
- Fix registerLogicTableAlias memory leak and add duplicate check
- Add executor tests for alias registration
